narrative:
Preble Shawnee Local Sd (Preble) school district has 6,071 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.9 percentage points.
